COMPANY THREE / 2024     HEALTHCARE & RESEARCH

COMPANY THREE

Care, without the complexity.

HEALTHCARE — RESEARCH — HEALTHCARE — RESEARCH — HEALTHCARE — RESEARCH —
SCROLL
Wereducedanxietybeforewereducedclicks,andthatchangedeverything.
14 to 4

Minutes trimmed from patient onboarding

Care, clarity, and reassurance01 - 04

The Brief

A healthcare product designed to feel calm before it feels clever.

Healthcare journeys break when the interface ignores emotional context. Company Three needed to simplify booking, records, and communication, but the deeper challenge was helping patients feel supported while they used the system.

We designed the product around reassurance. Language softened. Priority states became clearer. Accessibility moved from a checklist to a design principle. Every flow was tuned to reduce cognitive load and create steadier momentum.

The final product did not just perform better. It felt better. That distinction mattered to patients, staff, and stakeholders in equal measure.

What We Built

01J

Journey Mapping

Patient and staff pathways mapped end to end to expose hidden anxiety points in the service flow.

02B

Booking Experience

Appointments redesigned around clarity, reassurance, and lower effort at each step.

03R

Records Access

Health information structured to feel navigable and understandable without losing rigor.

04A

Accessibility QA

Contrast, focus, semantics, and support patterns tested against real accessibility requirements.

05N

Notification Design

Reminder and status systems designed to be calm, useful, and never alarming without reason.

06U

Usability Testing

Iterative validation with staff and patients to tune the emotional feel as much as task speed.

Care journey

"The best healthcare interfaces make people feel looked after before they even meet a person."

How we made care feel calmer.

01
Discovery
We spoke with patients, care staff, and support teams to understand the quiet points of failure hidden inside the admin journey.
02
Strategy
The product had to feel reassuring first and efficient second, with accessibility baked into the core interaction model.
03
Design
We simplified flows, softened hierarchy, and used motion and spacing to reduce cognitive load across complex tasks.
04
Delivery
The result shipped with reusable UI patterns, healthcare-safe messaging states, and a fully tested onboarding flow.

Project outcomes.

"

Healthcare UX is hard because the stakes are real. This team treated it with the seriousness it deserved. Our patients noticed immediately.

D

Dr. Ananya K.

Head of Digital, Company Three
